channel.title: CyberNetSec - Industrial Control Systems
channel.description: Latest industrial control systems threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: Manufacturing Sector Faces Precise, Targeted Attacks, SonicWall Reports
item.description:
A SonicWall report finds that while overall cyberattack volume on the manufacturing sector has dropped, attackers are now using more precise, targeted strikes against the convergence of IT and OT networks. The sector recorded the highest rate of SCADA attacks and saw significant exploit activity aga...

Severity: High

Categories: Industrial Control Systems, Cyberattack, Vulnerability

Read Full Article →

item.title: Ransomware attack on Coca-Cola's Fairlife halts U.S. milk production
item.description:
Fairlife, a dairy subsidiary of The Coca-Cola Company, has suspended all U.S. production after a ransomware attack compromised its IT and operational technology networks. The breach was detected on July 16, 2026, leading to an immediate shutdown of affected systems and the launch of an incident resp...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Cyberattack, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: Cyberattack on Nichirei disrupts Japan's food supply, impacts KFC
item.description:
Japanese logistics giant Nichirei Corporation suffered a major cyberattack, causing significant disruption to the nation's food supply chain. The attack, detected on July 13, forced the company to halt operations at its refrigerated warehouses, impacting major clients like KFC Japan, which warned of...

Severity: High

Categories: Cyberattack, Supply Chain Attack, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: Ransomware group leaks data from contractor of India's largest nuclear plant
item.description:
The 'World Leaks' ransomware group has leaked 14.3 GB of files allegedly stolen from Reliance Group, a contractor for India's Kudankulam Nuclear Power Plant (KKNPP). The data, posted on the dark web, includes purported blueprints, supplier lists, and equipment reviews. Reliance Group confirmed a 'pa...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Ransomware, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: Siemens ROX II Zero-Day Chain Allows Full Root Access on OT Switches
item.description:
Security researchers from Palo Alto Networks' Unit 42, in collaboration with Siemens, have discovered a critical exploit chain of three zero-day vulnerabilities in Siemens RUGGEDCOM ROX II operational technology (OT) switches. The vulnerabilities, tracked as CVE-2025-40948, CVE-2025-40947, and CVE-2...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Vulnerability, Industrial Control Systems, Threat Intelligence

Read Full Article →

item.title: Aphena Pharma Hit by Chaos Ransomware; 142 GB of Data Claimed Stolen
item.description:
The Chaos ransomware group has claimed an attack on Aphena Pharma Solutions, a U.S.-based pharmaceutical contract manufacturer. The group listed the company on its dark web leak site on July 14, 2026, alleging the theft of 142 GB of 'critical corporate data,' including sensitive financial documents....

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Data Breach, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: New APT 'Armored Likho' Deploys 'BusySnake' Stealer Against Energy & Government
item.description:
Kaspersky researchers have identified a new advanced persistent threat (APT) group, "Armored Likho," targeting government and electric power sectors in Russia, Brazil, and Kazakhstan. The group conducts cyber-espionage and financially motivated attacks using a new Python-based malware called "BusySn...

Severity: High

Categories: Threat Actor, Malware, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: UK Grid Operator SSEN Transmission Joins European Body to Bolster Energy Sector Cybersecurity
item.description:
SSEN Transmission, the operator of the high-voltage electricity grid in northern Scotland, has joined the European Network for Cyber Security (ENCS) as an Information & Knowledge Sharing member. This strategic partnership aims to enhance the resilience of the UK's critical energy infrastructure by f...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Industrial Control Systems, Threat Intelligence

Read Full Article →

item.title: Lakelands Public Health (Ontario) Breach Affects 60,000 Individuals
item.description:
Lakelands Public Health in Ontario, Canada, has announced a cybersecurity incident that exposed the personal and health information of approximately 60,000 people. The breach, discovered in January 2026, involved an unauthorized third party gaining remote access to a server, then accessing, extracti...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Ransomware, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: Millions of IoT and Embedded Devices at Risk from Unpatched Flaws in FatFs Library
item.description:
Security firm runZero has disclosed seven vulnerabilities in the FatFs filesystem library, a component embedded in millions of IoT and industrial devices from vendors like Espressif and STMicroelectronics. The flaws, tracked as CVE-2026-6682 to -6688, can be triggered by a maliciously crafted SD car...

Severity: High

Categories: Vulnerability, IoT Security, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →
